title: Crichards
compiled_truth: Crichards is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-12-29 to 2001-11-13), Crichards sent 5 and received 35 emails, totalling 40 interactions. Top correspondents: [Board](people/board-isda) (5), [Apapesch](people/apapesch-isda) (2), [Skawano](people/skawano-isda) (2), [Rpickel](people/rpickel-isda) (1), [Esebton](people/esebton-isda-eur) (1).
